text: Final audit: testAllFull passed 450 JVM core, 447 Scala.js core, 30 JVM laws, 30 Scala.js laws, plus both full-optimized Scala.js test links. JVM and Scala.js API docs generated cleanly; both benchmark targets compile. Short n=128 JMH runtime smoke completed at 136.017 ops/s (single measurement; smoke evidence, not a stable performance claim).
